name: diego-cc-kit

plugins.name: diego-cc-kit
plugins.description: Personal orchestration kit: 6 sub-agents, triage/implement/orchestrate/verify/codegraph-usage skills, and safety hooks (bash-validator, style-check, session snapshots, worktree lifecycle).

plugins.name: evidence-kit
plugins.description: PR/issue evidence pipeline: capture-evidence (Playwright video/screenshots of a local web app) + github-evidence (inline embed via user-attachments upload).
